hero.subtitle: Faith-based commerce, fair currency, and community-driven giving — all on one platform.

features.title: One Platform, Three Pillars
features.marketplaceDesc: Buy and sell with divine oversight. Auctions, classifieds, and procurement — all with built-in fairness guarantees.
features.credonDesc: Stable, faith-backed clone currency. Earn bonuses on every purchase. Accessible worldwide in 84+ denominations.
features.sacredDesc: Donations that multiply. USB prayer collections. Every transaction builds community and sustains the mission.

donate.title: Give, and It Shall Be Multiplied
donate.desc: Your generosity ripples outward. Every donation earns Credon bonuses, amplifying your impact across the community.

usb.title: Premium USB Prayer Collection
usb.desc: A beautifully crafted collection of prayers, meditations, and sacred texts — on a premium metal USB drive. Includes digital download.

footer.desc: Divinely underwritten commerce for a connected world. Shop, give, and grow together.
